askCmdr.title: Ask Cmdr

@askCmdr.title.description: Title of the Ask Cmdr chat rail, where the user chats with an AI about their files. This is the product name; keep it as-is.

@askCmdr.close.description: Accessible label for the button that closes the Ask Cmdr chat rail. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.newChat.description: Label for the button that starts a fresh Ask Cmdr conversation. Sentence case.

askCmdr.empty.title: Ask about your files

@askCmdr.empty.title.description: Heading of the Ask Cmdr rail's empty state, shown before the first message. Sentence case.

askCmdr.empty.hint: Cmdr can look at what you’re browsing, your drives, and your file history to answer. It only reads names, paths, and sizes, never file contents.

@askCmdr.empty.hint.description: Explanatory text in the Ask Cmdr rail's empty state, describing what the assistant can see. The apostrophe is a curly typographic apostrophe (U+2019).

@askCmdr.composer.placeholder.description: Placeholder text in the Ask Cmdr message input box. Ends with an ellipsis character (…).

@askCmdr.composer.send.description: Accessible label for the button that sends the typed Ask Cmdr message. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.composer.stop.description: Label for the button that stops the assistant while it is answering. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.thinking.description: Shown while the assistant is reasoning before it starts replying. Ends with an ellipsis character (…).

askCmdr.softCap.message: This chat is getting long. A fresh one keeps replies fast and focused.

@askCmdr.softCap.message.description: A gentle nudge shown once an Ask Cmdr conversation grows past its soft length cap. Friendly, not a hard limit.

@askCmdr.softCap.action.description: Button that starts a new Ask Cmdr conversation, shown alongside the getting-long nudge. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.tool.appState.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant reading the user's current view (open folders, cursor, selection). Shown while the tool runs. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.tool.appState.done: Looked at what you’re looking at

@askCmdr.tool.appState.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant read the user's current view. The apostrophe is U+2019.

@askCmdr.tool.listDir.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant listing a folder's contents and size. Shown while the tool runs.

@askCmdr.tool.listDir.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant listed a folder.

@askCmdr.tool.largestDirs.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant finding the biggest subfolders by size.

@askCmdr.tool.largestDirs.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant found the biggest subfolders.

@askCmdr.tool.importantFolders.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant finding the user's most important folders.

@askCmdr.tool.importantFolders.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant found the user's most important folders.

@askCmdr.tool.folderImportance.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant scoring how important one folder is. The apostrophe is U+2019.

@askCmdr.tool.folderImportance.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant scored a folder's importance. The apostrophe is U+2019.

@askCmdr.tool.listVolumes.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant listing the user's drives and their index freshness.

@askCmdr.tool.listVolumes.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant listed the user's drives.

@askCmdr.tool.operationsList.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant searching the operation log (past copies, moves, deletes, renames).

@askCmdr.tool.operationsList.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant searched the operation log.

@askCmdr.tool.operationsGet.doing.description: Present-tense status for the assistant reading one logged file operation's detail.

@askCmdr.tool.operationsGet.done.description: Past-tense label after the assistant read one file operation's detail.

@askCmdr.tool.unknown.doing.description: Present-tense fallback status for a tool the rail doesn't have a specific label for.

@askCmdr.tool.unknown.done.description: Past-tense fallback label for a tool the rail doesn't have a specific label for.

@askCmdr.tool.refused.description: Shown on a tool line when the assistant asked for something Ask Cmdr can't do (it's read-only). The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.noKey: Add your API key in settings to start chatting.

@askCmdr.error.noKey.description: Shown when the chosen AI provider has no API key. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed.

askCmdr.error.notConfigured: Turn on an AI provider in settings to use Ask Cmdr.

@askCmdr.error.notConfigured.description: Shown when no AI provider is set up. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed.

askCmdr.error.noConsent: Turn Ask Cmdr on to start chatting. You choose what it can see first.

@askCmdr.error.noConsent.description: Shown when the user hasn't opted into Ask Cmdr yet (or the consent copy changed and needs re-accepting), so the backend refused to send. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed; points the user at the opt-in screen.

askCmdr.error.unavailable: Couldn’t reach the AI provider. Check your connection and try again.

@askCmdr.error.unavailable.description: Shown when the AI provider is unreachable. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.timeout: That took too long. Try again?

@askCmdr.error.timeout.description: Shown when the AI request timed out. Friendly; avoids the words error and failed.

askCmdr.error.authFailed: The provider didn’t accept your API key. Check it in settings.

@askCmdr.error.authFailed.description: Shown when the provider rejected the API key. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.rateLimited: The provider is busy or you’re out of quota. Try again in a bit.

@askCmdr.error.rateLimited.description: Shown when the provider is rate-limiting or the account is out of quota. Friendly; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.budgetExhausted: This one hit its limit before finishing. Try asking something more specific.

@askCmdr.error.budgetExhausted.description: Shown when a single answer used up its tool-step or time budget before finishing. Friendly and actionable; avoids the words error and failed.

askCmdr.error.unfinishedReply: The reply didn’t finish. Try again?

@askCmdr.error.unfinishedReply.description: Shown when the reply stream stopped before completing (a provider drop or a crash). Friendly; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.error.provider: Something went wrong on the provider’s side. Try again?

@askCmdr.error.provider.description: Shown for any other provider-side problem. Friendly; avoids the words error and failed. The apostrophe is U+2019.

@askCmdr.loadEarlier.description: Button at the top of a long Ask Cmdr chat that loads the previous page of older messages. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.threads.open.description: Accessible label and tooltip for the rail header button that opens the list of past Ask Cmdr chats. Sentence case.

askCmdr.sessions.title: Chats

@askCmdr.sessions.title.description: Heading of the Ask Cmdr panel listing the user's past chats. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.back.description: Accessible label for the button that closes the chats list and returns to the active conversation. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the box that searches across all past Ask Cmdr chats. Ends with an ellipsis character (…).

@askCmdr.sessions.searchLabel.description: Accessible label for the Ask Cmdr chats search input. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.empty.description: Shown in the chats list when the user has no saved Ask Cmdr conversations. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.emptyArchived.description: Shown in the chats list, in archived view, when nothing is archived. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.noResults.description: Shown when a search across past Ask Cmdr chats finds nothing. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.showArchived.description: Toggle that switches the chats list to show archived conversations. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.hideArchived.description: Toggle that switches the chats list back to active-only, hiding archived conversations. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.loadMore.description: Button that loads the next page of older chats in the list. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.searching.description: Shown while a search across past chats is running. Ends with an ellipsis character (…).

@askCmdr.sessions.rename.description: Accessible label for the button that renames a chat in the list. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.renameLabel.description: Accessible label for the inline text box that edits a chat's title. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.archive.description: Accessible label for the button that archives a chat (hides it from the active list, no delete). Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.unarchive.description: Accessible label for the button that restores an archived chat to the active list. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.sessions.archivedBadge.description: Small badge marking an archived chat in the list. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.composer.attach.description: Button in the composer that attaches the file or folder selected in the active pane, so the user can ask about it. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.composer.dropHint.description: Overlay shown on the composer while a file or folder is dragged over it, inviting a drop. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.attachment.remove.description: Accessible label for the small button that removes a staged file or folder attachment from the composer. Sentence case.

askCmdr.consent.title: Talk to Cmdr about your files

@askCmdr.consent.title.description: Heading of the one-time opt-in screen shown before the first Ask Cmdr chat. Warm and inviting. Sentence case.

askCmdr.consent.intro: Ask Cmdr sends your questions to the AI provider you choose, using your own API key. Here’s exactly what leaves your Mac when you chat:

@askCmdr.consent.intro.description: Opening paragraph of the Ask Cmdr consent screen, before the list of what gets sent. Ends with a colon introducing the list. The apostrophe is U+2019.

@askCmdr.consent.item.messages.description: First item in the Ask Cmdr consent list of what leaves the Mac: the text the user types. Short noun phrase, sentence case.

askCmdr.consent.item.names: The names and paths of files and folders Cmdr looks at to answer you

@askCmdr.consent.item.names.description: Consent list item: the file and folder names and paths Cmdr reads to answer. Never the file contents. Sentence case, no period.

@askCmdr.consent.item.sizes.description: Consent list item: the sizes and dates of those files and folders. Short noun phrase, sentence case.

askCmdr.consent.item.envelope: What you’re looking at right now: your current folder, cursor, selection, and connected drives

@askCmdr.consent.item.envelope.description: Consent list item describing the app-state envelope sent with each question: the current folder, cursor position, selection, and connected drives. Sentence case, no period. The apostrophe is U+2019.

askCmdr.consent.item.attachments: Any file or folder you attach to a question, by its name and path only

@askCmdr.consent.item.attachments.description: Consent list item: files or folders the user attaches to a question are sent by reference (name and path), never their contents. Sentence case, no period.

askCmdr.consent.noContents: Cmdr never sends the contents of your files. It can’t: in this version there’s no tool that reads them. Ask Cmdr only looks and speaks; it never changes anything.

@askCmdr.consent.noContents.description: Reassurance paragraph on the Ask Cmdr consent screen: file contents are never sent, and the assistant is read-only. The apostrophes are U+2019.

askCmdr.consent.local: Your chats stay on your Mac, in a local database you can open and read. You pick the provider and model, and you can see what each conversation costs.

@askCmdr.consent.local.description: Paragraph on the Ask Cmdr consent screen: chats are stored locally and the user controls the provider, model, and cost visibility.

askCmdr.consent.logsNote: If you turn on LLM call logging in Advanced settings, Cmdr also saves each request and reply to a folder on your Mac. Those logs stay local too, never sent anywhere.

@askCmdr.consent.logsNote.description: Smaller note on the Ask Cmdr consent screen about the optional local LLM call log (the logLlmCalls setting): the logs are written to a local folder and never transmitted.

@askCmdr.consent.accept.description: Primary button on the Ask Cmdr consent screen that opts in and unlocks the chat. Starts with a verb. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.consent.decline.description: Secondary button on the Ask Cmdr consent screen that closes the rail without opting in. Sentence case.

@askCmdr.cost.tokens.description: The token count in the chat's cost footer. countText is the preformatted number (with thousands separators); count is the raw integer that selects singular or plural.

countText.content: The token count, already formatted with thousands separators, like 1,234.

count.content: The raw token count as an integer, used only to pick the singular or plural word.

@askCmdr.cost.free.description: Cost readout for a chat answered entirely by the local on-device model: it costs nothing. Lowercase, shown after the token count.

@askCmdr.cost.estimate.description: Estimated cost of a chat with a known cloud model. amount is a preformatted currency string like $0.0023. Lowercase 'about' signals it's an estimate, not an exact bill.

amount.content: The estimated cost, already formatted as a currency amount, like $0.0023.

@askCmdr.cost.unknown.description: Cost readout when the chat used a model that isn't in the price table: the tokens are known but the price isn't, so the cost is honestly unknown (never shown as free). Lowercase, shown after the token count.

askCmdr.cost.label: This chat’s usage

@askCmdr.cost.label.description: Accessible label for the chat's cost footer region (token count and estimated cost). The apostrophe is U+2019.
